questions.title: Missed condition in a multi-step calculation
questions.originalQuestion: A class has 36 students. Three quarters joined clubs. How many students joined clubs?
questions.diagnosis: The answer used an incomplete fraction relationship and skipped the condition check.
questions.explanationSummary: Turn three quarters into 36 x 3 / 4, then verify the result is reasonable.

questions.title: Unit conversion omitted in the final answer
questions.originalQuestion: A rope is 2.4 meters long and is cut into 6 equal pieces. How many centimeters is each piece?
questions.diagnosis: The calculation found 0.4 meters but did not convert meters to centimeters.
questions.explanationSummary: First divide meters, then convert 0.4 m to 40 cm before writing the answer.

tutorReply.summary: Focus on the current wrong question: identify the missed condition, then verify the final answer.

exercise.stem: Use the same method to solve a similar one-step variant.
